monte_carlo.method: Block-bootstrap of joint historical segments (index return, ret_0–ret_3, T-bill); listed ETP where available with VIX-linked synthetic daily-reset pre-inception.

levered_pnl_model: Nasdaq 100 golden-cross signals; 2x days via QLD with synthetic fallback. Monte Carlo: Block-bootstrap of joint historical segments (index return, ret_0–ret_3, T-bill); listed ETP where available with VIX-linked synthetic daily-reset pre-inception.
